articles.title: The Big Summer Preview – New Starter Sets and ready painted terrain - Warhammer Community
articles.description: Dive into Warhammer 40,000, and fight on the battlefields of Armageddon with new terrain kits.

articles.title: July’s Miniature of the Month and collectable coin revealed - Warhammer Community
articles.description: See what you can get if you head to your local Warhammer store in July.

articles.title: Amid Steam Machine performance scrutiny, Valve removes '4K at 60FPS' claim - Eurogamer
articles.description: Valve appears to be walking back on the claims its expensive Steam Machine can consistently power native 4K60 gaming.

articles.title: New Report Alleges Quantic Dream's Star Wars Eclipse Is in Trouble as Staff Go on Strike Over Layoffs Plan - IGN
articles.description: A new report has shed light on the goings on at French studio Quantic Dream and revealed concern about the future of Star Wars Eclipse.

articles.title: Potential Xbox Series X|S owners: You should probably upgrade this July - TrueAchievements
articles.description: With warnings of further price hikes coming for the video game console market, potential Xbox Series X|S owners might want to upgrade in July 2026.

articles.title: After 10 months with the Pixel 10 Pro, I can't stand these 3 issues - Android Authority
articles.description: I love a lot about the Pixel 10 Pro, but months of network problems, overheating, and battery anxiety eventually outweighed its strengths.
